title: Falcon Data Security — new module launched
summary: CrowdStrike introduced Falcon Data Security: AI-powered classification for data in motion, GenAI data-leak prevention across browsers, local apps, and runtime cloud environments. Discovers, classifies, and stops data theft in real time.
why_it_matters: Insider mistakes and credential abuse are now the leading data-loss vectors. Falcon Data Security plugs into the same console you already use — no separate DLP product to deploy if your contract includes the new module.

title: Falcon Spring '26 Release — Query Translation Agent + Defender EDR data ingest
summary: Spring '26 release added an agentic Query Translation Agent that converts Splunk queries into CrowdStrike Query Language, plus native ingest of Microsoft Defender EDR data into Falcon Next-Gen SIEM (no Falcon sensor required for SIEM analytics).
why_it_matters: Lowers the migration cost from legacy SIEMs and lets organizations standardize on Falcon's analytics even on endpoints that aren't running the Falcon sensor.

title: GovCloud expansion: agentic automation + IT/OT protection in FedRAMP High
summary: CrowdStrike expanded its GovCloud offerings with agentic automation, proactive threat defense, and unified IT/OT protection — all within the FedRAMP High boundary.
why_it_matters: Relevant for any client subject to federal compliance frameworks — confirms Falcon's continued investment in the regulated end of the market.
